prompt_text:
### Demographics: 63-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 12 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; History of myocardial infarction
Body mass index category: Normal
Major Depressive Disorder
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~10 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Liraglutide 1.8mg once daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 60.1 kg; Height 167.6 cm; BMI 21.4 kg/m²; Blood pressure 132/84 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.8%; 9 months ago 8.2%; 6 months ago 8.6%; 3 months ago 8.6%; current 8.6%), FPG (12 months ago 211mg/dL; 9 months ago 212mg/dL; 6 months ago 214mg/dL; 3 months ago 238mg/dL; current 215mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 62.2kg; 9 months ago 58.2kg; 6 months ago 59.3kg; 3 months ago 57.7kg; current 60.1kg), Height (12 months ago 167.6cm; 9 months ago 167.6cm; 6 months ago 167.6cm; 3 months ago 167.6cm; current 167.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 21.0kg/m²; current 21.4kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 133mmHg; 9 months ago 129mmHg; 6 months ago 129mmHg; 3 months ago 134mmHg; current 132mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 83mmHg; 9 months ago 83mmHg; 6 months ago 86mmHg; 3 months ago 85mmHg; current 84mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 10U/L; 9 months ago 18U/L; 6 months ago 18U/L; 3 months ago 17U/L; current 15U/L), AST (12 months ago 31U/L; 9 months ago 30U/L; 6 months ago 29U/L; 3 months ago 22U/L; current 29U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 29mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 23mL/min/1.73m²; current 23mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 347mg/g; 9 months ago 364mg/g; 6 months ago 394mg/g; 3 months ago 438mg/g; current 395mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 95mg/dL; 9 months ago 95mg/dL; 6 months ago 94mg/dL; 3 months ago 90mg/dL; current 92mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 57mg/dL; 9 months ago 53mg/dL; 6 months ago 57mg/dL; 3 months ago 54mg/dL; current 55mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 180mg/dL; 9 months ago 167mg/dL; 6 months ago 165mg/dL; 3 months ago 164mg/dL; current 174mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.0g/dL; 6 months ago 10.0g/dL; 3 months ago 10.8g/dL; current 9.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.64 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
